description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black metal body and a prominent vertical magazine extending downward from the receiver. The weapon features a cylindrical receiver with a rounded rear end, a folding metal stock, and a pistol grip made of dark brown or black polymer or wood. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple muzzle, lacking any visible attachments. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with a front post and a rear notch. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a vertical magazine, folding stock, and iron sights. The design is utilitarian and suited for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, folding stock, pistol grip, and vertical magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight post, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded receiver end and alignment of the stock and barrel.
